summary:
**Needle found and fixed!** The issue was in `/app/src/codegen.rs`: the `generate_getter` function for `FieldType::Ref` cases was generating owned return types (e.g., `-> Company`) instead of references (e.g., `-> &Company`). This broke nested accessor tests and code inspection in `test.sh`.

I fixed it by replacing the format string in the `Ref` match arm:
- Old: `"    pub fn {}(&self) -> {} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n"`
- New: `"    pub fn {}(&self) -> &{} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n"`

After rebuilding and running `test.sh`, all tests now PASS:
- Simple accessor test: PASS
- Complex nested accessor test: PASS
- Generated code inspection: PASS

The generated code now correctly uses `-> &Company` and `-> &Address` for reference fields.
